response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of solid full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, C/C++, Java) and demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, talks, and founding an open-source platform. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging systems, or growth/measurement infrastructure — the core focus of this Principal IC6 role. Background leans toward product/full-stack and data integration rather than the systematic experimentation and telemetry platform work required.
strengths: 13+ years engineering experience across multiple languages matching JD requirements (C/C++, Java, JS/TS, Python-adjacent)
Distributed systems experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby handling millions of HTTP requests/second with low-latency services
Demonstrated technical leadership: founded GISCollective, ran workshops, organized refactoring dojos, mentoring background
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout automation — central to the role
Lacks evidence of metrics/telemetry infrastructure or statistical analysis experience for experimental quality and bias detection
Title progression (Senior/Staff) and scope suggest strong IC but not clearly at Principal/IC6 level of cross-org influence on foundational platforms

key_factors.factor: Strong polyglot engineering breadth and longevity
Limited evidence of Principal-level cross-team platform leadership
